stamp.title: US Scott 156, 1c Franklin (Continental) with Secret Mark
stamp.summary: 1c Benjamin Franklin, blue, 1873 Continental Bank Note Co. printing. This stamp is identified as Scott 156 by the presence of the 'secret mark' added to the design: a small crescent-shaped dash inside the pearl located just to the left of the numeral '1' in the bottom center tablet. The centering is very good, with balanced margins.

stamp.title: US Scott 145, 1c Franklin (National) without Secret Mark
stamp.summary: 1c Benjamin Franklin, blue, 1870 National Bank Note Co. printing. This stamp lacks the secret mark in the pearl to the left of the numeral '1', distinguishing it as the earlier National printing (Scott 145). The color is a slightly lighter blue compared to the Continental issue. Centering is fine to very fine.
